Table '3989574182 4' 4-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: Starksams (500 in chips) 
Seat 2: scorza23 (500 in chips) 
Seat 3: vsvv14 (500 in chips) 
Seat 4: thekingtree (500 in chips) 
Starksams: posts the ante 10
scorza23: posts the ante 10
vsvv14: posts the ante 10
thekingtree: posts the ante 10
scorza23: posts small blind 25
vsvv14: posts big blind 50
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to scorza23 [7s 3s]
thekingtree has timed out
thekingtree: folds 
thekingtree is sitting out
Starksams: calls 50
scorza23: folds 
vsvv14: checks 
*** FLOP *** [8d 6h 7d]
thekingtree has returned
vsvv14: bets 50
Starksams: calls 50
*** TURN *** [8d 6h 7d] [Qh]
vsvv14: bets 50
Starksams: raises 50 to 100
vsvv14: calls 50
*** RIVER *** [8d 6h 7d Qh] [6d]
vsvv14: bets 50
Starksams: raises 240 to 290 and is all-in
vsvv14: calls 240 and is all-in
*** SHOW DOWN ***
Starksams: shows [Qd Qs] (a full house, Queens full of Sixes)
vsvv14: shows [9c Ts] (a straight, Six to Ten)
Starksams collected 1045 from pot
vsvv14 finished the tournament in 12th place
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot 1045 | Rake 0 
Board [8d 6h 7d Qh 6d]
Seat 1: Starksams (button) showed [Qd Qs] and won (1045) with a full house, Queens full of Sixes
Seat 2: scorza23 (small blind) folded before Flop
Seat 3: vsvv14 (big blind) showed [9c Ts] and lost with a straight, Six to Ten
Seat 4: thekingtree folded before Flop (didn't bet)
